Adapters.Description: Future adapter for Microsoft Update Catalog package metadata. Current implementation must stay link/manual metadata only.
ManualCollectionSteps: Open the existing Microsoft Update Catalog search link from the evidence bundle.
Record the exact result title, support URL/result ID, version, release date, architecture, and supported OS list.
Do not download through DeviceCheck yet; package download and signature verification need a separate workflow.
Adapters.NextImplementationGate: Design a read-only catalog parser that extracts metadata without downloading packages.

Adapters.Description: Future adapter for OEM/vendor support metadata. Current implementation must stay manual metadata only.
ManualCollectionSteps: Use the evidence bundle hardware ID and current provider/device name to find the official OEM support page.
Record only metadata from the official OEM/vendor domain.
Do not run OEM installers from this layer; installer behavior needs snapshot/rollback planning first.
Adapters.NextImplementationGate: Design domain allow-listing and vendor page metadata extraction before any download support.

Adapters.Description: Future adapter for offline SDIO-style driverpack indexes. Current implementation has no driverpack parser.
ManualCollectionSteps: Do not use this adapter until a local driverpack/index source is intentionally cloned and studied.
When available, parse only local index metadata first; do not extract or install packages.
Compare INF Hardware IDs against the evidence bundle before considering package metadata review.
Adapters.NextImplementationGate: Study SDIO/offline driverpack index format locally and build a read-only parser.
